steps.prompt: We're going to make a picture! First, add an object — tap the plus button.
Add another — what else belongs in your picture?
steps.feedback: Two things! Your picture is growing.

steps.prompt: One more to finish — add a third object.
steps.feedback: Three! They might be stacked on top of each other — tap the pile to pick one out.

steps.prompt: Tap the pile and pick an object to move.
steps.feedback: Got one! Now drag it where you want it.

steps.prompt: Drag them around to arrange your scene — put everything just where you want it.
steps.feedback: Beautiful! You made that all by yourself.
